sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9958" key="a)ntiqrhne/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντιθρηνέω</orth>, <sense id="n9958.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wail in return,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τινί</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">An.Ox.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.180</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
